exploration_notes: Searched Sourcegraph for Loki (github.com/sg-evals/grafana-loki) and Mimir (github.com/sg-evals/grafana-mimir) repositories. In Mimir, `pkg/api/api.go` is the central route registration file using `RegisterRoute(path, handler, auth, gzipEnabled, method)` where `auth=false` means no authentication middleware is applied. Many operational/status routes (rings, config, buildinfo, flush, shutdown, tenants, etc.) are registered with `auth=false`. The `/ready` endpoint is also registered without auth i
